recordPlayEntry write failure swallowed (try/catch console.error only, spx-play-engine.ts:915-927) + force-close without outcome row (db.ts:1234-1238) -> a real win/loss can show as never-happened. Genuine code bug independent of the veto fix
reconcileAllMemberships O(users) serial network I/O, no advisory lock, no concurrency bound (membership.ts:210-291) -> times out + races Clerk/Whop entitlement writes across replicas at scale
Polygon leader-lock refresh bare expire() no ownership check, constant value (polygon-socket.ts:149-154) -> GC pause >25s lets two live index sockets coexist
Polygon connect-throw does not release leader lock/flag (polygon-socket.ts:405-409) -> a replica with failing WS construct holds lock forever, starves whole cluster index feed
uw-socket flow_alerts handler does void persistAndPublishFlowAlert per alert with no concurrency bound (uw-socket.ts:592-615) -> open-bell burst = unbounded pending promises on heap
options-socket optionMarks.set never deleted on unsubscribe (options-socket.ts:443) -> monotonic in-memory growth across expiries on long-lived replica
Telemetry read-path per-replica in-memory (api-telemetry.ts:39-42) -> admin dashboard sees 1/N of traffic, rate-limit counts fragmented
Cross-replica cache split-brain on Redis outage (shared-cache.ts:81-143) -> 5 replicas serve divergent GEX walls/tape >=30s with no alarm
Schema-failure re-init stampede (db.ts:663-674) -> on transient DB blip every concurrent caller re-enters createPool() amplifying load on a down DB; needs backoff

spx-desk-merge module-singleton lastGoodStructure read-modify-write per request (spx-desk-merge.ts:82-220) -> concurrent requests cross-contaminate structure levels; grounding hole on a 100%-correct surface

SYSTEMIC fail-open cron-write guard if(cronSecret && auth!==Bearer) accepts unauthenticated POST when CRON_SECRET unset + non-constant-time. Instances: coaching/alerts (P0 cto), market/anomalies, market/regime, track-record/publish:9. Secret set in prod so latent, but one missing env var = open public write. Fix all -> isCronAuthorized (fail-closed)

ROOT CAUSE of recurring unauth-endpoint + fail-open findings: API auth is self-guard-by-convention, no default-deny/lint/test. Each cycle finds a NEW unguarded route (now 5: anomalies, regime, signals/open, brief/premarket, platform/intel). Fix: CI grep-test asserting every route.ts calls an auth helper

options-socket shard 0 in persistent server-initiated code=1006 reconnect loop (failures=531, ~8h no sustained auth). consecutiveFailures only resets on successful auth (options-socket.ts:405-406); not the stall watchdog (gates off-hours :453-457). /embed/track-record relaxes CSP to frame-ancestors * but still emits X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN -> browsers honor XFO, legitimate 3rd-party embedding of track-record widget is blocked. Fix: strip X-Frame-Options on /embed/* responses

Site-wide CSP script-src allows unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval (TradingView/Next bootstrap). Weakens XSS protection but no sink (0 dangerouslySetInnerHTML). Hardening: migrate to nonce/hash, drop unsafe-eval if unused

payment.failed webhook unhandled -> on declined renewal user keeps full premium through entire dunning window (days-weeks) until membership.deactivated fires. Revenue leak + no card-fix nudge. Bounded by hourly reconcile + past_due grace but silent/unbounded-until-deactivation. Fix: handler recording dunning + ops alert + bounded grace timer
invoice.past_due/marked_uncollectible/voided unhandled -> cannot observe dunning transitions, no payment-problem signal, no deterministic grace-end. 7/37 webhook events handled
